scripts.test:chat:integration: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --project chillgo-61439 --config ../firebase.json --only auth,firestore,functions "mocha lib/test/chat/chat_integration.test.js"
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --project chillgo-61439 --config ../firebase.json --only auth,firestore,functions "mocha lib/test/agreement/agreement_integration.test.js"
